bead.title: Record escalation trace as structured evidence on bead
bead.description: When the execute loop escalates through tiers, each tier-attempt is recorded individually but there is no single structured kind:escalation-summary event that captures the complete escalation trace (which tiers tried, why each failed, which won, total wasted cost). Add a summary event after escalation completes for at-a-glance diagnosis.
bead.acceptance:
1. After the tier escalation loop finishes (success or exhaustion), a kind:escalation-summary bead event is appended with a JSON body containing: tiers_attempted (list of {tier, harness, model, status, cost_usd, duration_ms}), winning_tier (or exhausted), total_cost_usd, wasted_cost_usd.
2. The event is recorded in the execute-bead loop path.
3. Unit test: mock 3-tier escalation (cheap fail, standard fail, smart success) -> event body contains all 3 tiers with correct statuses and costs.
4. cd cli && go test -run TestEscalationSummary ./... && go build .
